name: Zucchini Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut zucchini into strips that are 1/4 inch thick.
2. Heat oil in a pan; add garlic and onion and cook until the vegetables are tender but not browned.
3. Add meat and brown, stirring to keep it crumbly.
4. Add tomatoes, tomato paste, mushrooms, wine, oregano, thyme, basil, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Simmer uncovered for 1-1/2 hours.
6. Place half of the zucchini strips in an oiled shallow casserole dish.
7. Top with half of the Mozzarella and Ricotta cheeses.
8. Add half of the meat sauce.
9. Repeat layers.
10. Top with Parmesan cheese.
11. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes.
